action.reasoning: Observation: New best mae_60min=3.4527. Val plateaued early (~30 epochs). Training MAE=2.54 vs val=2.70, slight overfit. Analysis: To improve further, I should try: (1) larger model capacity, (2) curriculum/scheduled sampling, or (3) ensemble. Given time budget (~2h, 20 iters left), let me try a bigger model with more channels and longer receptive field. Each epoch took 12s; bigger model may take 20s. Let me try increasing skip/end channels and adding more dropout. Decision: Train a larger variant with RC=64, DC=64, longer training with more regularization.
action.command: RC=64 DC=64 SC=256 EC=512 DROP=0.3 EPOCHS=100 LR=1e-3 WD=1e-4 BS=64 SCHED=cosine python train.py
